# validationMetrics

**Instance Property**

Measurements of the regressor’s performance on the validation data set.

## Declaration

```swift
var validationMetrics: MLRegressorMetrics { get }
```

## Evaluating a decision tree regressor

- **evaluation(on:)**: Evaluates the classifier on the provided labeled data.
- **trainingMetrics**: Measurements of the regressor’s performance on the training data set.
